title: AI Trust Score—
description:
Much like the FICO— Score measures non-deterministic risks in credit and fraud, the
Tumeryk AI Trust Score— assesses and rates the trustworthiness of AI-generated
prompt responses, offering enterprises a reliable metric to manage and mitigate risks in
AI outputs. The AI Trust Score can be integrated into business processes to help
determine whether the content should be accepted, flagged, or blocked, thus allowing
organizations to migrate risks associated with AI-generated content.

items: Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
Audit reflection accuracy by comparing stated & observed planning outcomes.
